entries.name: Sensitive Information Disclosure
entries.notes: Enforce role-based access control on model inference endpoints; restrict access to training data, fine-tuning data, and model configuration based on clearance and need-to-know

entries.name: Excessive Agency
entries.notes: Enforce access control on all AI tool invocations; require authorisation for each tool call based on agent identity, context, and action type

entries.name: System Prompt Leakage
entries.notes: Restrict access to system prompt configurations to authorised personnel; enforce role-based access control and change management on all prompt modifications

entries.name: Vector and Embedding Weaknesses
entries.notes: Enforce role-based access control on vector database operations; restrict who can read, write, and delete embeddings

entries.name: Tool Misuse and Exploitation
entries.notes: Enforce role-based access control on all agent tool resources; validate all tool parameters as untrusted; deny by default

entries.name: Identity and Privilege Abuse
entries.notes: Enforce access control at every tool invocation boundary; validate agent identity and authorisation for each requested action regardless of calling context

entries.name: Sensitive Data Leakage
entries.notes: Enforce role-based access control on all AI data stores; restrict access based on clearance, need-to-know, and data sensitivity

entries.name: Shadow AI and Unsanctioned Data Flows
entries.notes: Enforce access control preventing data transfer to unauthorised AI tools; monitor and block shadow AI usage

entries.name: Tool Plugin and Agent Data Exchange
entries.notes: Enforce access controls on all data exchanged with tools and plugins; restrict data sharing to minimum necessary per tool permission manifest

entries.name: Multimodal Cross-Channel Leakage
entries.notes: Enforce consistent access controls across all modalities; restrict cross-modal data access based on sensitivity classification

entries.name: Cross-Context Conversation Bleed
entries.notes: Enforce access controls scoped to the current session and tenant; deny cross-context data retrieval by default

entries.name: Unsafe Natural Language Data Gateways
entries.notes: Enforce allow-listed operations for NL data gateways; gateway queries execute with the requesting user's permissions, not system-level; restrict to read-only or approved operations

entries.name: Vector Store Platform Security
entries.notes: Implement RBAC on vector stores; enforce namespace-level access controls; restrict query scope to authorised collections

entries.name: Excessive Telemetry and Monitoring Leakage
entries.notes: Enforce access controls on all telemetry data stores; restrict access to observability pipelines based on role and need-to-know

entries.name: Inference and Data Reconstruction
entries.notes: Enforce access controls on inference endpoints; rate-limit API access; restrict bulk query patterns enabling reconstruction

entries.name: Human-in-Loop and Labeler Overexposure
entries.notes: Enforce access controls limiting labeler exposure to sensitive content; segment data so labelers only access content within their clearance scope

entries.name: Model Exfiltration and IP Replication
entries.notes: Enforce strict access control on AI intellectual property; restrict model weight access to minimum necessary personnel with approval workflow

entries.name: Cross-Context Conversation Bleed
entries.notes: Enforce information flow controls preventing data from crossing session, tenant, or conversation boundaries; implement strict context isolation

entries.name: Excessive Agency
entries.notes: Enforce least privilege for all AI agent tool access, API permissions, and autonomous action scope; restrict to minimum capabilities needed per deployment

entries.name: Tool Misuse and Exploitation
entries.notes: Enforce least privilege for all agent tool permissions; per-tool permission manifests, minimum scope, irreversibility classification

entries.name: Identity and Privilege Abuse
entries.notes: Enforce least privilege with explicit privilege ceilings per agent; prevent accumulation of permissions through tool chaining or inter-agent delegation

entries.name: Agent Identity and Credential Exposure
entries.notes: Restrict agent permissions to minimum necessary for each task; enforce that agent privilege cannot exceed the authorising user's privilege

entries.name: Over-Broad Context Windows
